c.d: The range of live streaming content available, including genres like sports, gaming, entertainment, and news.
The ease of navigation and overall user experience within the app.
The range of devices and platforms the app supports, such as smartphones, tablets, smart TVs, and web browsers.
The pricing structure, including free access, subscription fees, and availability of premium features.
Availability of features that allow user interaction, such as live chat, virtual gifts, and audience engagement tools.
